law: Critical Infrastructure Defence Act, SA 2020, c C-32.7 (Alberta)
purposes: To protect essential infrastructure such as pipelines and railways from damage
To protect essential infrastructure such as pipelines and railways from unauthorized entry

provisions.text: A person must not wilfully enter on any essential infrastructure without lawful right, justification or excuse. (from training data)
A person must not wilfully damage or destroy any essential infrastructure. (from training data)
A peace officer may arrest, without warrant, any person whom the peace officer finds committing an offence under this Act. (from training data)

derivation:
MTM-Literal derivation
  m = |purposes| = 2
  n = |provisions| = 3
  purposes served by ≥1 provision = 2/2
  → F (Faithfulness) = 2/2 = 1.0000
  provisions serving no purpose = 0/3
  → X (Excess)       = 0/3 = 0.0000
  α = 0.5, β = 0.5
  MTM-L = 100 · [α · (1 − F) + β · X]
        = 100 · [0.5 · (1 − 1.0000) + 0.5 · 0.0000]
        = 100 · [0.0000 + 0.0000]
        = 0.00
